title: NebulaCompileRecord
description: The JSON object printed on stdout by `nebula compile --target <t> --out <dir> --json`. Describes the emitted deployment artifact so an agent or pipeline can locate and run it without parsing human output.

out_dir.description: Directory the package was written to (the `--out` argument).

entry_module.description: Path to the runnable entry module — `python <entry_module>` runs the program.

modules_emitted.description: Number of `.py` modules emitted (one per `.neb` file in the import graph).
